name: Svelte
description: A radical approach to building user interfaces that shifts much of the work to compile time. Svelte produces highly optimized vanilla JavaScript, resulting in smaller bundles and better performance.
advantages: No virtual DOM for smaller bundle sizes
Compiled to vanilla JavaScript for excellent performance
Built-in state management without external libraries
Easier learning curve than React or Angular
Great for building animations and transitions
disadvantages: Tooling is less mature than React ecosystem
